pi_items.source: Found in task.json expected actions, setup_task.sh OUT_DIR, and export_result.sh as AGENT_FITS.
Found in task.json expected actions, setup_task.sh INSTRUCTIONS, and export_result.sh as AGENT_TXT.
FITS header TELESCOP='UIT', ORIGIN='UIT/GSFC', downloaded from fits.gsfc.nasa.gov. Data represents real observations from UIT.
FITS header OBJECT='NGC4151', downloaded as UITfuv2582gc.fits from the NASA GSFC samples archive.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on real astronomical data, specifically a NASA Ultraviolet Imaging Telescope (UIT) sample FITS file for galaxy NGC 4151. The image is downloaded directly from fits.gsfc.nasa.gov during environment setup. Output file requirements are strictly verified by export_result.sh to be at /home/ga/AstroImages/snr_analysis/output/snr_map.fits and snr_results.txt.
